inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar mehsoos kar rahi hoon aur bahut thakawat mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also cause fever and malaise

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although typhoid is possible, the symptoms are not specific enough to confirm it at this stage

inputs.text: Mere bukhar mein roz roz izafa ho raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai aur kabz ki shikayat hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The step-wise increase in fever and abdominal pain are indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also cause abdominal pain, but the fever pattern is not typical

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the abdominal symptoms and fever pattern

inputs.text: Ab mujhe tez bukhar ho raha hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai aur bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness is highly suggestive of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea, but the fever and weakness pattern is not typical

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the specific combination of symptoms

inputs.text: Main bahut thakawat mehsoos kar rahi hoon, bukhar abhi tak baqi hai aur pet mein bahut dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The persistent high fever, exhaustion, and severe abdominal pain are consistent with typhoid, which requires immediate medical attention

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the prolonged fever and specific abdominal symptoms

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific combination and severity of symptoms
